problem_statement: A protected context refresh repeatedly fails to enter a bounded work queue even though its producer is healthy. Diagnose the bottleneck without raising the cap.

observations.statement: A read-only snapshot shows pending depth exactly 500 of 500, with 476 stale low-value evaluations and 24 protected refresh records.
Producer logs show the protected refresh is generated on schedule and rejected only at the full-depth admission check.
In an isolated queue copy, retiring one stale low-value item admits and drains the refresh with the cap, producer code, and payload unchanged.
